top_signals.title: Meta agrees Indian AI data center deal as hyperscaler bolsters its infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Meta signs a deal with Mukesh Ambani's Reliance Industries to lease an AI-enabled data center in India.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Alberta Eyes General Corridor for New Pacific Oil Pipeline
top_signals.summary: Alberta is more likely to propose a “general corridor” rather than a specific route for the new 1 million-barrels-per-day oil pipeline to the British Columbia coast that’s expected to receive federal government approval as a project of national interest. Canada’s oil heartland, Alberta, has been seeking to advance the new pipeline for months, but it doesn’t have a firm route hashed out yet, because it needs talks and consultations with indigenous communities and British Columbia’s provincial authorities. Alberta…

top_signals.title: Western Africa Import of Clean Petroleum Crashes 44% YOY
top_signals.summary: "During April to May, Western Africa’s clean petroleum product (CPP) imports fell 44% year on year, from 1,144 thousand barrels per day (kbpd) to 642 kbpd,” says Niels Rasmussen, Chief Shipping Analyst at BIMCO.The drop in import volumes cut tonne miles by 47% year on year…

top_signals.title: Boots eyes £7.5bn sale in blow to hopes of London IPO
top_signals.summary: The owners of Boots are weighing up a £7.5bn sale which would dash hopes of a London listing and deal another blow to the UK’s stock exchange. Sycamore Partners, the private equity firm which bought Boots’ parent company for $23.7bn last year, has been in talks with a number of suitors since before Easter. The [...]

top_signals.title: Real Madrid underline financial power by signing new €1bn kit deal with Adidas
top_signals.summary: Real Madrid have received a financial boost after signing a new eight-year kit deal with Adidas that is believed to be the most lucrative in world football. The 15-time European champions and the German sportswear behemoth have opted for an early extension to their partnership, which will now run until at least 2034. Real Madrid’s [...]
